name: Blood of Onnotangu
text:
Seeker role only.
During conflicts at this province, each player cannot spend fate from his or her fate pool.

name: Tears of Amaterasu
text:
Keeper role only.
Reaction: After this province is revealed – gain 1 fate for each attacking character.

name: Staunch Hida
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as a defender – resolve the ring effect of that conflict as if you were the attacking player. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Karada District
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
Action: Give an opponent 1 fate. Choose an attachment on a character that player controls – take control of that attachment and attach it to an eligible character you control, if able. Otherwise, discard it.

name: Doji Representative
text: Action: During a conflict – move this character home.

name: Kitsuki Yaruma
text:
Courtesy. No Poison attachments.
Reaction: After this character enters play, choose an unbroken province – turn that province facedown.

name: Gifted Tactician
text: Reaction: After this character wins a [mil] conflict – draw 1 card.

name: Hito District
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
[pol] conflicts cannot be declared against this holding's province.

name: Isawa Kaede
text:
Immune to opponents' ring effects.
While this character is attacking, the contested ring gains the [void] element. If this character wins the conflict as an attacker, instead of choosing an element to resolve, resolve each of that ring's effects.

name: Swift Magistrate
text: While this character is attacking, each other character that has 1 or more fate on it does not count its skill toward the resolution of this conflict.

name: Windswept Yurt
text: Action: Sacrifice this holding, select one – each player gains 2 fate or each player gains 2 honor. Refill this province faceup.

name: Seal of the Crane
text: Attached character gains the  clan symbol and the Duelist trait.

name: Disdainful Remark
text:
Keeper role only.
Action: During a conflict, if you control a participating Courtier character – until the end of the conflict, the attacked province gets +X strength. X is equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

name: Jade Masterpiece
text: Action: Bow this attachment. Choose an unclaimed ring – move 1 fate from the chosen ring to another unclaimed ring.

name: Time for War
text:
Seeker role only.
Reaction: After you lose a [pol] conflict, choose a Bushi character you control – put a Weapon attachment with printed cost 3 or lower into play from your hand or conflict discard pile, attached to that character.

name: Embrace the Void
text:
Play only if you control a Shugenja character.
Interrupt: When 1 or more fate would be removed from attached character – instead, move that fate to your fate pool.

name: Meek Informant
text: Reaction: After you play this character – look at an opponent's hand.

name: Smoke and Mirrors
text: Action: During a conflict, choose any number of attacking Shinobi characters you control – move each chosen character home.

name: Goblin Sneak
text: Reaction: After this character enters play – place 1 fate from an opponent's fate pool on it.

name: Finger of Jade
text:
Attach to a character you control.
Interrupt: When the effects of a card ability that targets attached character would initiate, sacrifice this attachment – cancel those effects.
